message:
refactor: use ResizeObserver for viewport detection

Replace JS viewport queries with ResizeObserver polyfill in isolated
world. Simplifies coordinate mapping by removing frame ratio adjustment
code - viewport dimensions now updated reactively when Chrome reports
changes.

- Add resize_polyfill.js injected in isolated world
- Handle __TERMWEB_RESIZE__ marker in cdp_events.zig
- Remove chrome_inner_frame_width/height fields (no longer needed)
- Simplify render.zig to use chrome_inner dimensions directly
- Remove debug logging from render.zig
